success_criteria: Unit Test Coverage > 80% (General), > 95% (Auth/Finance components); Zero Linting Errors
escalation_procedure: Notify Developer immediately via PR comment
business_impact: Prevents technical debt accumulation and basic logic errors from entering the mainline.

success_criteria: Zero Critical/High Vulnerabilities in Dependencies; No Secrets Detected in Code; Docker Image Scan clean
escalation_procedure: Security Architect review required for False Positive waivers
business_impact: Ensures supply chain security and prevents credential leakage (SOC 2 requirement).

success_criteria: 100% Pass Rate on Financial Ledger Integration Tests; Stripe Webhook Signature Verification Tests Pass; API Schema Validation Pass
escalation_procedure: Immediate notification to Lead Backend Engineer
business_impact: Guarantees financial transaction integrity and third-party API compatibility before deployment.

success_criteria: 100% Pass Rate on Critical User Journeys (Vendor Reg -> Proposal -> Award -> Invoice); Zero P1/P2 Defects
escalation_procedure: Release rollback in Staging; QA Lead investigation
business_impact: Verifies full system orchestration and user experience stability.

success_criteria: API p95 latency < 250ms; Vector Search p95 < 200ms; LCP < 2.5s; No memory leaks under 1k concurrent user load
escalation_procedure: Performance optimization sprint required if threshold breached
business_impact: Ensures system can handle production load and meets SLA commitments.

success_criteria: Zero Critical/Serious WCAG 2.1 AA Violations; PII Sanitization Logic Verified
tools_used: axe-core, Manual Screen Reader Tests, Custom PII Scanners
escalation_procedure: Product Owner sign-off required for exceptions
business_impact: Mitigates legal risk regarding accessibility lawsuits and GDPR non-compliance.
